name: ospex-openclaw-skill
description: On-chain sports betting skill for OpenClaw agents. Integrates with the live ospex.org application for decentralized sports prediction markets.
review: Excellent sports betting skill with an active organization and live application at ospex.org. Integrates OpenClaw agents with on-chain sports prediction markets. Conditional: needs formal LICENSE file added.
catalog_note: License file pending. Author notified. Org has live application at ospex.org.
